tools.name: show_docs
tools.description: Show the Promocodes.com ChatGPT connector documentation page — quick-start setup, example prompts, available tools, and troubleshooting. Use when the user asks how to set up the connector, what the app does, or wants to see the intro page.

tools.name: get_coupons
tools.description: Get coupons and deals for a store. Use when the user asks for coupons (e.g. 'Nike coupons', 'Adidas coupons', 'Dell deals'). Each coupon shows 'Use code' or 'Get deal' depending on whether it has a discount code.
